看似是仙门圣女，心里实际上是蔫坏。一副清纯无比的样子，虽未曾戏弄人间，却看一些画本，而且一切在和林浅墨回到地球互换身体后，一一实验！
林浅墨本是地球人，穿越而来成为剑道魁首的弟子，两人小时候就相识，可一直被李相宁压一头。
甚至在一次秘境中，意外被这人俘获，被复刻了些许画本的故事。
本想着应付过去算了，但是没想到越来越过分！
结果奋力反抗却不敌于她。
林浅墨也认识到了，这位人前乖巧的仙门圣女并不单纯。
从此以后，李相宁开心了，过来复刻画本。
不开心了，也过来复刻画本，甚至更狠。
而且每次复刻的时候，总是一口一个要成亲，一口一个要成亲。
而且，等到修为足够，将要穿越回地球时，李相宁跟过来了！
回到地球后，不仅和自己发生了灵魂互换，还....","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/90a3937e0faee950cdd95a87acc4b447~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"墨雨银竹","author_id":"","book_id":"7542650368988023832","book_name":"和仙门圣女互换，回现代被调成妻","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#90a0c8","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4256人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":872,"name":"追夫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=872&name=追夫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":831,"name":"灵魂互换","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=831&name=灵魂互换&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7559333303283614232","read_count":"4256","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"195255"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"93","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,幻想言情,追夫,异世穿越,灵魂互换,今穿古,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/90a3937e0faee950cdd95a87acc4b447~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181501&x-signature=FwXI7%2FPNlQDOIxtPPqYq5AEc4KI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1009822346514170","extra":{"comment_jump_s
